site.name: Beautiful Gate Lesotho
site.tagline: Together Bringing Hope to Children & Families
site.slogan: Be the reason a child smiles.

programs.title: Child Care & Protection
programs.description: We provide safe, loving homes for orphaned, abandoned, and neglected children aged newborn to 5 years, giving them the care and dignity every child deserves.

programs.title: Education & Development
programs.description: From early childhood development at Sefate Sa Bophelo English Medium School to school readiness, we invest in every child's intellectual and emotional growth.

programs.title: Adoption & Family Reunification
programs.description: Our ultimate goal is to unite children with forever families — locally and internationally — through adoption ceremonies that are celebrations of God's faithfulness.

programs.title: Health & Nutrition
programs.description: From baby formula and nutritious meals to medical check-ups and a dedicated on-site nurse, we ensure every child's physical wellbeing is prioritized.

programs.title: Community Outreach
programs.description: We partner with local communities, volunteers, and faith-based organizations to strengthen families and prevent child abandonment before it happens.

programs.title: Peka Expansion Project
programs.description: Beautiful Gate 2 in Peka, Leribe will serve older children (6+) and those with special needs — bringing our mission to a second district of Lesotho.

blog_posts.title: A Happy 23rd Birthday to Beautiful Gate Lesotho!
blog_posts.excerpt: Twenty-three years of walking in faith, caring for the most vulnerable, and trusting God to provide. We celebrate this milestone with grateful hearts.

blog_posts.title: It's Graduation Season!
blog_posts.excerpt: Our children sang, performed, and received their certificates at a beautiful preschool graduation ceremony at Sefate Sa Bophelo English Medium School.

blog_posts.title: A Long-Awaited Celebration
blog_posts.excerpt: We celebrated our first adoption ceremony of 2021 — long-term volunteers Thabo and 'Mathapelo Robbert officially welcomed their daughter into their forever family.

involvement.title: Give
involvement.description: Whether a once-off gift or a monthly commitment, your donation sustains daily operations and funds new projects. R6,000 covers one child for a whole month.

involvement.title: Volunteer
involvement.description: We welcome outreach teams, skilled volunteers (plumbing, carpentry, special needs therapy), and a volunteer fundraiser to help grow our international donor base.

involvement.title: Pray
involvement.description: Join our global prayer team. Receive our quarterly newsletter and monthly prayer updates as we trust God together for every child's future.
